text.title: Refactoring Anti-patterns
text.summary: Failures that turn refactoring into regressions: big-bang, no tests, mixing with features, over-engineering, agent-specific risks.

antipattern.description: Big-bang refactoring — changing everything at once across many files
antipattern.reason: Long broken period, high merge conflict rate, impossible to bisect failures. Apply the strangler pattern instead.

antipattern.description: Refactoring without tests — no safety net
antipattern.reason: Without tests you cannot verify behavior is preserved. The risk of introducing bugs equals a rewrite, not a refactor.

antipattern.description: Mixing refactoring with behavior changes in the same commit
antipattern.reason: Mixed commits violate the refactoring definition (behavior unchanged) and make bisect useless.

antipattern.description: Over-engineering: converting a 4-branch if into a 4-class strategy hierarchy
antipattern.reason: Polymorphism adds indirection cost. Apply only when branches > 4 and each branch is non-trivial and will grow independently.

antipattern.description: Incomplete refactoring — leaving the code in a worse intermediate state
antipattern.reason: Half-extracted methods are harder to understand than the original. Commit only when the refactor is complete.

antipattern.description: Agent changes types during refactoring (e.g. int to Decimal) claiming it's "cleanup"
antipattern.reason: Type changes alter behavior (rounding, comparison, serialization). Forbid type changes inside refactor commits.

antipattern.description: Agent renames a symbol but misses string-based references (JSON keys, DB column names, reflection)
antipattern.reason: Text rename is incomplete. Require a grep of the full repo for the old name before claiming done.

antipattern.description: Agent modifies assertion contents inside tests during a refactor commit
antipattern.reason: Changing assertions during refactoring removes the safety net retroactively. Tests must not change except to add characterization tests for uncovered branches.

text.reference: Pre-commit hook blocking sprawling refactor commits.
